use_codes.desc: TPOXX IS INDICATED FOR THE TREATMENT OF HUMAN SMALLPOX DISEASE IN ADULTS AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS WEIGHING AT LEAST 3 KG

indications.text:
1.1 Treatment of Human Smallpox Disease
TPOXX® is indicated for the treatment of human smallpox disease caused by variola virus in
adults and pediatric patients weighing at least 3 kg.
1.2 Limitations of Use
The effectiveness of TPOXX for treatment of smallpox disease has not been determined in
huma...
